label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: HERRADA Jesus won from a 26-rider breakaway after GANNA Filippo set destructive pace that whittled group down, holding off KAITHEBO's flamme rouge attack
tactical_patterns: GANNA Filippo rode tempo for THOMAS Geraint in breakaway, replicating Sky train tactic despite both being escaped riders themselves
KAITHEBO Jonathan attacked at flamme rouge but THOMAS Geraint bridged with HERRADA/GREGOIRE, suggesting breakaway coordination against isolated EF rider
GC group saw EVENEPOEL Remco attack neutralized when SEPULVEDA/ROGLIC immediately marked, showing peloton unwilling to race day after time trial
OTTERBROCK Sean went early from GC group targeting top-10 position, revealing teams now racing for minor placings mid-race

rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: showed willingness and ability to set destructive breakaway pace on 14-16% ramps despite being pure time trialist
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: positioned himself in 26-rider break and bridged to Kaithebo's attack, actively racing for top-10 despite GC deficit
rider_signals.KAITHEBO Jonathan: negative: isolated when attacking at flamme rouge from breakaway, EF unable to place second rider in 26-man group
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: attacked GC group in young rider jersey but immediately marked, no one willing to let him gain time post-TT
